title: Pet Pass: Trade Your Pets!
description: Pet Pass is a mod that allows you to give your pets to other players!
body:
**How to Use**
![How to craft the pet proof](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/589604587523276800/1039337863109685298/image.png)


First, craft a Pet Proof of Ownership in a crafting table.

 

Then, right click the pet you want to give away.


![Binding the pet](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/589604587523276800/1039338221433258114/image.png)

Lastly, give the Proof of Ownership to the player you want to give the pet to. They then have to right click that pet with the proof to receive it.

![Receiving the pet](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/589604587523276800/1039338764528517130/image.png)

And you're done! Now they have the pet.



Note: This mod should work with most other modded tamable entities as long as they extend the TamableEntity class. Therefore, it works with mods like Wyrmroost and Ice and Fire.
